checks.evidence: runs/v0-run7/final/klayout_gds/argus_soc.klayout.gds: 41MB. GDS streamout via KLayout successful.
runs/v0-run7/final/nl/argus_soc.nl.v — post-P&R gate-level netlist present.
runs/v0-run7/final/ contains all required deliverables (spef/, sdf/, lib/, def/, lef/, sdc/).
runs/v0-run7/55-openroad-stapostpnr/summary.rpt: 9-corner breakdown present. All 73 stages completed.
timing__setup__ws: 3.273 ns (max_ss_100C_1v60). All 9 corners positive. 0 setup violations. Reg-to-reg setup WNS: 14.338 ns.
checks.fix_was_applied: CLOCK_PERIOD 20ns→40ns (50MHz→25MHz) — CONFIRMED WORKING. Setup closed with 3.27ns margin.

checks.evidence: timing__hold__ws: -0.846 ns (max_ss_100C_1v60). 90 hold violations (10 per corner, all 9 corners). timing__hold_r2r__ws: 0.100 ns (PASS — all 90 violations are I/O, NOT reg-to-reg). timing__hold_vio__count: 90, timing__hold_r2r_vio__count: 0. TNS: -7.31 ns.

fix.description: All 90 hold violations are I/O hold — set_min_delay needed on I/O paths. Current SDC has set_input_delay -min 1.5, set_output_delay -min 1.5. Hold WNS -0.846ns means min delays need ~1.0ns more margin.
fix.action: Increase min I/O delays in SDC from 1.5ns to 3.0ns. Add set_min_delay constraints for critical I/O paths. Increase hold clock uncertainty from 0.15ns to 0.30ns. Re-run LibreLane with updated SDC.
fix.command: Update SDC: set_input_delay -min 3.0 [all_inputs]; set_output_delay -min 3.0 [all_outputs]; set_clock_uncertainty -hold 0.30 [get_clocks clk_sys]. Then: cd /home/smdadmin/hermes_workspace/projects/PRJ-001/v0/08_backend_stage/librelane && unset LD_LIBRARY_PATH PYTHONPATH && PATH='/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/home/smdadmin/.local/bin' && /home/smdadmin/hermes_workspace/tools/librelane.AppImage librelane config.yaml --run-tag v0-run9

checks.evidence: route__drc_errors: 0. Detailed routing converged to 0 after 7 iterations.
klayout__drc_error__count: 17 (m4.2: 11, m3.2: 4, m2.2: 2). Minor metal spacing violations — likely acceptable for MPW but needs signoff decision.

fix.description: 17 KLayout DRC violations are metal spacing (m2/m3/m4). These are minor — typical for first-pass digital P&R. For MPW shuttle, these are often waivable.
fix.action: Document the 17 metal spacing violations. If waivable: note in signoff report. If must fix: increase routing spacing margins or reduce die utilization.

checks.evidence: design__lvs_error__count: 69. Breakdown: unmatched_pins=42, unmatched_nets=11, unmatched_devices=7, net_differences=9. LVS log says 'Top level cell failed pin matching.' Circuit1 (layout): 18897 nets, Circuit2 (schematic): 18888 nets — 9 net difference. SRAM blackbox is the root cause: abstract view has disconnected pins not present in the gate-level netlist.

fix.description: LVS errors are from SRAM blackbox pin mismatch. The blackbox has 4 disconnected output pins (tied to 0 in RTL). Netgen sees these as unmatched between layout and schematic.
fix.action: Option A (recommended): add LVS ignore properties for SRAM pins. Option B: connect blackbox outputs to dummy loads. Option C: use LVS BOX cell for SRAM. For MPW tapeout, these LVS errors on a blackbox macro are standard practice — document and waive.

checks.evidence: design__instance__utilization: 45.9%. Die area: 1,219,300 µm² (1.22 mm²). FP_CORE_UTIL: 40.
IR drop reports present. Total power ~16.5 mW (from v0-run4-r2).
antenna__violating__nets: 0, antenna__violating__pins: 0. 78 antenna diodes inserted.

design__max_slew_violation__count: 2,133 (all in ss_100C_1v60 corner: max=2133, min=1161, nom=1533). Other corners: 31-73. Slew violations are ss-corner dominant — expected at 25MHz without custom transition constraints.

fix.description: 2,133 slew violations all in ss corner. Add tighter set_max_transition constraint in SDC.
fix.action: Add 'set_max_transition 1.0 [current_design]' (current: 1.5ns) to SDC. This will force synthesis and P&R to use stronger drivers for high-fanout nets in ss corner.

checks.evidence: design__max_cap_violation__count: 147 (max_ss: 147, min_ss: 69, nom_ss: 104). All in ss corner.
design__max_fanout_violation__count: 2 (all corners: 2). Minor.

results/ contains only gds/ from v0-run4-r2. No RUN_TAG file, no metrics.json from v0-run7, no def/, spef/, sdf/ from latest run. The complete v0-run7 deliverables are at librelane/runs/v0-run7/final/ but not copied to results/.

fix.description: Copy v0-run7 deliverables to results/ for handoff.
fix.action: mkdir -p results/librelane && cp -r librelane/runs/v0-run7/final/* results/librelane/ && cp librelane/runs/v0-run7/final/metrics.json results/librelane/ && echo 'v0-run7' > results/RUN_TAG

checks.evidence: All disables have inline comments with justification and expiry. ERROR_ON_SYNTH_CHECKS=false with named waived signals, expiry 'v0-run4'.
v0-run7 is complete with metrics.json and flow.log. Wall-clock time can be extracted from flow.log timestamps.
At 40ns clock, pre-PnR STA should show positive slack. Setup WNS final: 3.27ns confirms timing was closable.
PD_ITERATION_LOG.md only covers v0-run3 through v0-run6. v0-run7 and v0-run8 are NOT documented. The log must be updated with v0-run7 metrics before the stage can be considered audited.

fix.description: Append v0-run7 entry to PD_ITERATION_LOG.md with actual metrics from metrics.json.
fix.action: Append v0-run7 entry to PD_ITERATION_LOG.md with: CLOCK_PERIOD=40ns (25MHz), Setup WNS=3.27ns PASS, Hold WNS=-0.846ns (90 I/O violations), slew=2133, cap=147, DRC=0, LVS=69, KLayout DRC=17.

findings: PRIMARY: Setup timing CLOSED at 25MHz — CLOCK_PERIOD=40ns fix CONFIRMED. Setup WNS 3.27ns with 0 violations across all 9 corners.
CRITICAL: Hold timing FAIL — 90 I/O hold violations (WNS -0.846ns). All reg-to-reg hold is clean (WNS 0.10ns). Fix: increase min I/O delays in SDC.
CRITICAL: LVS FAIL — 69 errors from SRAM blackbox pin mismatch. Standard for blackbox macros — need waiver or LVS BOX treatment.
MAJOR: KLayout DRC — 17 minor metal spacing violations. Likely waivable for MPW.
MAJOR: PD_ITERATION_LOG.md missing v0-run7 and v0-run8 entries.
MAJOR: results/ handoff incomplete — v0-run7 deliverables not copied.
MINOR: 2,133 slew violations (all ss corner) — address with tighter max_transition constraint.
summary: v0-run7: 4 FAIL, 11 PASS, 4 CONDITIONAL_PASS. CLOCK_PERIOD relaxation (20→40ns) SUCCESSFULLY closed setup timing (3.27ns margin). Remaining work: (1) fix 90 I/O hold violations via SDC min delays, (2) document/waive 69 LVS errors from SRAM blackbox, (3) document 17 minor KLayout DRC violations. Moving to Phase 2: v0-run9 with hold-fixed SDC.
